project_name: Synology Cloud Dashboard - NAS File Explorer
design_philosophy: A premium, calm, modern and clean ('épuré') personal file manager in French. Inspired by native Mac Finder and Apple Photos, translated to the web. Focuses on frictionless navigation, glassmorphism ('crystal clarity'), high-contrast typography, and organic bento-grid layouts. It should feel like a luxurious extension of the user's personal memories and work.

layout_and_spacing.global_spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.gallery_grid: Dense masonry or strict grid without gaps or 2px gaps, mimicking Apple Photos. e.g., grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6.
layout_and_spacing.border_radii: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for main containers to give a soft, premium feel. rounded-xl for inner elements.

components.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. Solid bg-white or bg-white/70 glassmorphism. Right border 1px border-slate-200. Navigation links should be rounded-lg with icon + text, hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors.
components.top_navigation: Sticky top bar with AI search. Use Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50) so files slide beautifully underneath.
components.cards_and_files: Soft Neumorphic approach. Flat bg-white with 1px border-slate-200/50. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and soft shadow (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)]).
components.buttons: Primary actions (Login, Upload) use solid slate-900. Secondary use bg-white border border-slate-200. No generic blue unless explicitly requested.
components.search_bar: AI-powered natural language search (Recherche IA). Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bg-slate-100 border-none focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-slate-900/20. Add a subtle shimmer or sparkle icon to denote AI.
components.video_player: Sleek inline HTML5 player with rounded-2xl corners. Custom minimalist controls if possible.
components.file_details_panel: Right-side sliding panel or floating glassmorphic card for file metadata (size, mod date, type).
components.shadcn_overrides: Use Shadcn (.js versions). Remove the harsh borders from Card components. Customize Dialog for the photo lightbox preview (transparent overlay bg-black/80, no visible dialog borders). Use Command for the AI search dropdown.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Every clickable element MUST have a hover state.
motion_and_interactions.image_gallery: Images must have overflow-hidden. On hover, the inner img gets scale-[1.03] duration-500 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for smooth fade-in and slide-up (y: 10, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on mount.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Verify text-slate-500 on slate-50 background. If it fails, use text-slate-600.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Keyboard navigation must have visible focus rings.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='sidebar-nav-photos', data-testid='ai-search-input').

icons_library.name: lucide-react
icons_library.instructions: Use consistent stroke-width (1.5). For folders, use the filled variant or subtle colored stroke (like slate-800).

language: French (fr) - Ensure all UI copy (e.g., 'Photos', 'Vidéos', 'Documents', 'Recherche IA', 'Connexion', 'Récents') is natively localized in French.

media.description: Landscape, nature, and family photography for photo gallery demo.
Thumbnails for video files in the dashboard.
